blocks.label: Agent
blocks.description: AI agent that reasons, plans, and calls tools mapped beneath it on the canvas.

blocks.label: Tool
blocks.description: API or integration node — drag under an agent to map tools it can call.

blocks.label: MCP Tool
blocks.description: MCP server connection — set a name and URL, then map under an agent.

blocks.label: Skill
blocks.description: Behavioral skill — maps under an agent as a child node.

blocks.label: Integration
blocks.description: External integration — maps under an agent as a child node.

blocks.label: Executor
blocks.description: Eleven Nodes executor — typed message handler with send_message and yield_output.

externalAgents.label: LangGraph Agent
externalAgents.description: Stateful graph agent with tool routing and memory checkpoints.

externalAgents.label: Bedrock Agent
externalAgents.description: Managed agent on Amazon Bedrock with knowledge bases and action groups.

externalAgents.label: Vertex AI Agent
externalAgents.description: Gemini-powered agent with grounding and enterprise search.

externalAgents.label: CrewAI Agent
externalAgents.description: Role-based multi-agent crew member with delegated tasks.

externalAgents.label: AutoGen Agent
externalAgents.description: Conversational agent from the AutoGen multi-agent framework.

externalAgents.label: Copilot Studio Agent
externalAgents.description: Low-code agent from Microsoft Copilot Studio with M365 connectors.

externalAgents.label: Databricks Agent
externalAgents.description: Lakehouse-native agent with SQL, ML, and Unity Catalog tools.

externalAgents.label: Agentforce Agent
externalAgents.description: CRM-aware agent with Einstein trust layer and Data Cloud context.

externalAgents.label: Assistants API Agent
externalAgents.description: OpenAI Assistants with code interpreter, file search, and function calling.

externalAgents.label: Claude Agent
externalAgents.description: Anthropic Claude agent with extended context and tool use.

externalAgents.label: LlamaIndex Agent
externalAgents.description: RAG-first agent with document indexes and query engines.

externalAgents.label: HF Agents Agent
externalAgents.description: Open-model agent hub with transformers and inference endpoints.
